MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-14-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint And Substitute Doe Defendant
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES and CARPENTER EMPLOYERS CONTRACT ADMINISTRATION's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint And Substitute Doe Defendant is OFF CALENDAR, Notice of Settlement of Entire Case submitted for filing. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John Byrne, 818.593.5520 for Defendant GGP, Inc. (courtcall)
Eric Wiesner, 510.337.1001 for Plaintiff The Board of Trustess.

DEFENDANT GGP, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings

GRANTED without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to address in the opposition any allegations that are currently made in the complaint or that could be made if leave to amend is granted, showing the factual or legal basis for Plaintiff's assertion that GGP, Inc. may be liable for any relief that Plaintiff could obtain in this action. The Court further notes that it has never been presented with the Doe Amendment Application referenced in opposition. There are several available avenues for obtaining a Court's order depending on the nature of the request (e.g. motion, ex-parte, drop-off). None of the available methods have been employed by the Plaintiff.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Set For Trial On Nov-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
